BGM音量を50までフェードアウト
...Ugh, heavy...... Phew... There's quite a lot of stuff.

The village chief's request was to clean up this storage room. He wanted me to
somehow make this room, packed with lots of junk, usable...

Th-this... I might not finish this in one day. If only there was at least one more
person to help... But, well... I can't ask the village chief for such heavy
labor......

\SE[4]...The village chief asked me to come because he thought you might need help.
Cleaning this room is tough, right? Leave the wiping to me, and you handle the heavy
lifting.

Huh! Really? That's a huge help...! I was worried I wouldn't have enough time alone.
Thanks, Elly!

\SE[11]...It's not like I'm helping for your sake or anything...... I just came because the
village chief asked, so don't get the wrong idea...
O-okay... I'm still glad. Let's do our best together, Elly!
